occupations.label: Accounting / Finance Staff
secondary_signals: zi water for calculation and analysis
hai water for flow, vouchers, circulation
official star raises management level
women are more stable-fit than men in this pattern
occupations.notes: 文曾把财务会计类归到数据、规章、票据与统计管理。金水更偏规范化数据，水火更偏无形数据与信息流；官星与印星介入时，岗位更偏管理与审控。
occupations.product_safe_framing: Suitable for structured data, compliance, reporting, finance operations, and detail-heavy management work.

occupations.label: Teacher / Education
core_signals: wu or ji earth as platform or field
secondary_signals: metal-water often points to science
wood-fire often points to humanities
resource store or output store raises probability
public institution linkage points to formal teaching roles
occupations.notes: 文曾把教师象法放在场所、知识传递与学生承载上。印制食伤是核心模型，戊己土体现讲台、田地和承载学生的场域感。
occupations.product_safe_framing: Better suited to teaching, training, mentoring, content explanation, and structured knowledge transfer.

occupations.label: Military / Police / Discipline Systems
secondary_signals: seven killings raises enforcement flavor
peer store or blade pattern strengthens discipline path
public institution linkage increases certainty
occupations.notes: 文曾把军警象法集中在官制比劫、制阳刃、执法属性和强身体能上。能走出名堂与否，关键看是否真能制服同类竞争者与冲动之气。
occupations.product_safe_framing: Better aligned with rule enforcement, command structures, disciplined training, and high-pressure team roles.

occupations.label: Metaphysics / Divination Practitioner
secondary_signals: chou, shen, zi, hai often recur
hua gai, tai ji, tian yi increase symbolic flavor
calculation and analysis markers strengthen practice
occupations.notes: 文曾把命理师常见象法放在偏印、神煞、玄学场域与计算分析能力上，但不主张只靠神煞下判断，仍要回到格局与能力链条。
occupations.product_safe_framing: Fits advisory, pattern-reading, symbolic analysis, and interpretation-heavy guidance roles.

occupations.label: Athlete / Sports Star
core_signals: strong peer group or body markers
secondary_signals: yang ren or strong peer support
output controls authority or competition
fame and wealth require strong chart level
occupations.notes: 文曾把体育明星的核心放在身体、竞争、技术输出和成名格局上。不是单有运动象就行，还得有足够层次支撑名利结果。
occupations.product_safe_framing: Stronger fit for performance, competition, stamina-driven work, and fields where physical execution matters.

occupations.label: Entertainment / Film / Public Figure
secondary_signals: strong charm markers increase visibility
output raises expression and performance
wealth and official stars raise fame-commercialization link
occupations.notes: 文曾把影视明星象法放在外形、桃花、表达、曝光和商业转化能力上，强调能红的前提仍然是格局层次足够高。
occupations.product_safe_framing: More suited to visibility, media, performance, audience work, and image-based careers.

occupations.label: Traditional Chinese Medicine
secondary_signals: water-wood flow suggests medicine and bodily balance
earth adds cultivation and prescription grounding
resource stars improve learning lineage
occupations.notes: 文曾把中医象法放在水木土的生养格局上，偏向汤药、身体调理、生命力恢复和传统理法融合的路径。
occupations.product_safe_framing: Stronger fit for healing, regulation, diagnosis, and long-cycle body-care work.

occupations.label: Clinical Doctor / Surgery-oriented Medicine
secondary_signals: fire suggests blood, heat, operation process
metal suggests blade, instruments, procedures
fuller chart support improves diagnostic range
occupations.notes: 文曾把医生与中医区分开来，认为医生更偏火金，尤其是动刀、输血、器械和操作层面的象更强，但也提醒不要把医生断得过于绝对。
occupations.product_safe_framing: Better fit for hands-on clinical, procedural, surgical, or intervention-heavy medical work.

occupations.label: Restaurant / Hospitality
core_signals: output, wealth, and resource all participate
secondary_signals: fire-earth leans roast, barbecue, dry-heat dining
water-fire leans hotpot, soup, fast-moving food service
output-heavy charts often change lines before settling
occupations.notes: 文曾把餐饮行业拆成火、水、土三要素。火是烹饪，水是流动与快消，土是肉、场所、承载；真正能把店做起来，常见食伤、财、印三类都要能串起来。
occupations.product_safe_framing: More suited to service, food operations, storefront management, and high-turnover customer work.

occupations.label: Finance / Investment
core_signals: rule or control structure remains intact
secondary_signals: metal-water suggests circulation and stored flow
fire-metal suggests internet finance or investment operations
metal-wood suggests harvesting or aggressive financial extraction
seal controls output or official controls peers can indicate leadership or investment strategy
occupations.notes: 文曾把金融行业看作高层级行业，通常不建议在格局乱弱时硬往金融上断。能做大做强的，往往还要有统局、制尽或较完整的控制结构。
occupations.product_safe_framing: More aligned with capital flow, investment, financial strategy, institutional money work, and high-structure commercial roles.
